title: GATE-4B bot identity evidence
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL='\n'
sha='f4890faa002f8755c6f7803c097d157560d96af6'
queue_path=Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue=json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks':[]}
for task in queue.get('tasks',[]):
    if task.get('id')=='GATE-4':
        task['status']='WAITING_TELEGRAM_RECEIPT'
        task['identity_evidence_sha']=sha
        task['bot_username']='@BarberStaffBot'
        task['gate_pass']=False
        task['next_required_evidence']='real Telegram message receipt/response proof'
queue['updated_at']='2026-06-04T16:03:00Z'
queue['queue_state']='WAITING_TELEGRAM_RECEIPT'
queue['next_action']='operator or live Telegram integration must provide message response receipt; GPT must not mark PASS from profile screenshot'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path=Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
existing=log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line=json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T16:02:01Z','id':'GATE-4-IDENTITY','trace_id':'gate4_telegram_bot_identity_record','sha':sha,'status':'identity_recorded_not_pass','bot_username':'@BarberStaffBot','workflow_files_touched':False},ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing+=line+NL
log_path.write_text(existing,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state=Path('governance/state/GATE4B_RECORD_BOT_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4B','trace_id':'gate4b_record_bot_identity_evidence','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'GATE-4-IDENTITY','recorded_sha':sha,'bot_username':'@BarberStaffBot','gate4_status':'WAITING_TELEGRAM_RECEIPT','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'real Telegram message receipt/response proof'},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report=Path('governance/reports/GATE4B_RECORD_BOT_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-4B | Record bot identity evidence'+NL+'Status: completed'+NL+'Date: 2026-06-04'+NL+NL+'Recorded @BarberStaffBot identity evidence SHA f4890faa002f8755c6f7803c097d157560d96af6 in execution_log. Gate 4 remains WAITING_TELEGRAM_RECEIPT; profile screenshot is not sufficient for PASS.'+NL+NL+'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.'+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
